_comment: Central configuration for all tunable strategy parameters. All scripts read from this file at runtime. Edit here — do not scatter thresholds across source files.

strategy._comment: Entry/exit score gates and position-sizing parameters.

risk._comment: Hard risk limits — stop-loss, limit band, and default position cap.

indicators._comment: TA indicator periods. Changing these affects the signal-score logic — rerun the walk-forward backtest after any edit.

data._comment: Bar-fetch sizes. Increase if indicators need more warmup history.

api._comment: Retry policy for all Alpaca API calls. max_retry_attempts=1 disables retry.
